title: Modern HUD
body:
# ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3af737c93283a57682c0ea45f3b89de31b108ed5_0.webp)

Reewfe is no longer on modrinth. He has transferred his projects to this account.

### INFO
Modern HUD is a stylish resource pack that replaces the classic Minecraft user interface with a sleek, modern design. It is aimed at players who value a clean and contemporary gaming experience without changing the original functionality of the game.

The focus is on a minimalist style that makes the HUD (heads-up display) clear and uncluttered. Health, armor, hunger gauge, hotbar and other HUD elements have been visually redesigned to better fit in with modern texture packs or modpacks. The pack remains deliberately discreet so that it does not distract from the gameplay, but rather supports it.

Modern HUD is particularly suitable for players who want to experience Minecraft with a fresh look, whether in Survival, PvP or with an extensive modpack. It is fully compatible with shaders, performance mods such as Sodium or OptiFine and other UI-oriented extensions. Since only the interface is customized, it can easily be combined with other resource packs that change blocks, items or environments.

### 📥 Installation

1. Download the pack using the download button above

2. Place it in your .minecraft/resourcepacks folder

3. Activate it in the game under “Resource packs”

4. Have fun with your new HUD!

### 📌 Hint

This resource pack only changes the HUD (Heads-Up-Display). It does not affect the textures of the world, blocks or mobs. You can therefore combine it with other texture packs without any problems!

#
